title: Babel Beast
company: and for mythical creatures of Ancient Greece. Whether repurposing pop culture, childhood nostalgia or mythic storytelling, this explosive one-woman spectacle is familiar yet strange, energising yet intimate, and fundamentally “a love letter to speaking many languages” (audience response).
description: Kitchen Table TheatreSofia Natoli - Writer and PerformerLuna Laurenti & Al Hawkins - Co-directorsMartina Bizzarri - Choreographer
content_warnings: Potential contact with the audience, sexual references, partial nudity
